programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: Freddy goes after a Springwood teenager whos stuck working at a burger joint owned by his father

programme.title: Colorado
programme.desc: Trouble in Colorado is tying up Union troops needed back east during the Civil War and Lieut Burke is sent to investigate Macklin and his gang are causing the problems and Capt Mason joins them When Burke catches up with them he also finds Mason his brother

programme.title: Stagecoach to Denver
programme.desc: Lambert has the stagecoach wrecked killing the Commissioner so his phony replacement can alter Coonskins land survey When Red Ryder exposes the survey hoax Lambert has his stooge Sheriff put Red in jail

programme.title: The Three Mesquitters
programme.desc: When a group of World War 1 buddies head west to farmstead they run into trouble

programme.title: Rough Riders Round Up
programme.desc: Now that the Spanish-American war is over Roy and other Rough Riders become border patrolmen Their goal is to stop outlaws who are stealing gold from stagecoaches and express offices

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Great Grape Ape
programme.desc: The Great Grape Ape

programme.title: Hong 107
programme.desc: Hong 107

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Magic Gadget

programme.title: Hair Bear Bunch
programme.desc: Hair Bear Bunch

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: Rocky Bullwinkle Jet Fuel Part 31 Fractured Fairy Tales The Elves and the Shoemaker Dudley Do-Right Story 3 Rocky Bullwinkle Jet Fuel Part 32

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: Rocky Bullwinkle Jet Fuel Part 33 Fractured Fairy Tales Sleeping Beauty Peabodys Improbably History William Tecumseh Sherman Rocky Bullwinkle Jet Fuel Part 34

programme.title: Hydroplane Racing
programme.desc: 1997 Budweiser Cup

programme.title: The Underground War
programme.desc: A two-part documentary about networks of underground tunnels built on the front lines in the First World War During World War One a barbaric war was fought deep beneath the trenches in a maze of tunnels and dugouts over 10 metres underground

programme.title: Desert Generals
programme.desc: Britain would have lost her empire and the war in 1942 had Axis forces beaten the British army in the Middle East Tim Collins re-investigates Britain’s critical desert campaign and the controversial battle tactics needed to take on the unbeaten Panzer army in total war preventing Hitler from gaining Egypt Iraq and the oilfields Foreshadowing current world events this oil-rich region was crucial to the war effort These are the World War II battles that shaped the Middle East and created the world in which we live today

programme.title: The Long Shadow
programme.desc: Marking the centenary of World War One historian David Reynolds explores the enduring shadow the conflict has cast over Britain and Europe in the century that followed Travelling to locations across Europe from Slovenia to the Sudetenland Belfast to Berlin David Reynolds traces the war’s legacy arguing that it unleashed forces we still grapple with today This remarkable series also looks again at how the experience of war haunted the generation who lived through it in particular the soldiers who survived it – dynamic characters such as Benito Mussolini Eamon de Valera Philippe Petain James Ramsey MacDonald and Thomas Masaryk Reynolds examines how these men shaped the peace that followed war often in unpredictable ways

programme.title: The Long Shadow
programme.desc: Marking the centenary of World War One historian David Reynolds explores the enduring shadow the conflict has cast over Britain and Europe in the century that followed Travelling to locations across Europe from Slovenia to the Sudetenland Belfast to Berlin David Reynolds traces the war’s legacy arguing that it unleashed forces we still grapple with today This remarkable series also looks again at how the experience of war haunted the generation who lived through it in particular the soldiers who survived it – dynamic characters such as Benito Mussolini Eamon de Valera Philippe Petain James Ramsey MacDonald and Thomas Masaryk Reynolds examines how these men shaped the peace that followed war often in unpredictable ways

programme.title: Shaolin Super Dragon
programme.desc: Shaolin Super Dragon

programme.title: Return of the Tiger
programme.desc: Return of the Tiger

programme.title: Snake In The Eagles Shadow
programme.desc: Snake In The Eagles Shadow

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A journalist tries to solve the case of a mysterious serial killer whos been killing homeless people all across the city What he doesnt realize is how deep the conspiracy behind the murders goes

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: In this black comedy desperate real estate salesman Jake McElhaney tries to convince a magicians strange attractive twin daughters Frances and Priscilla Packard to sell their house

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Handsome audio engineer Eric Dunlap hired to install his strange top notch sound system with a mind of its own for an egotistical music conductor Kurt Hoffman but falls hard for Hoffmans beautiful neglected wife Veronica

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Alamo Joe catches up with Eric in a small town jail then attempts to grill him about his lycanthropy Eric tells him he still has hopes for a cure but later turns into a werewolf escapes from the jail and Alamo Joe is forced to kill him

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: With Eric apparently dead in the morgue Alamo Joe recovers from his wounds in the hospital and reevaluates his life decisions He fears he was bitten and will now become a werewolf Eric returns from the dead and escapes from the morgue

programme.title: Knight Knight
programme.desc: Stonetree is haunted after killing a young robbery suspect as Nick fights off a ghost from his past

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Friday the 13th The Series

programme.title: Invitation to Hell
programme.desc: A family moves to a suburban town only to be coerced into joining a suspicious club

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: After accidentally assaulting a mime obnoxious radio DJ Rick Rake is tormented by the mime Meanwhile it turns out that the mime is also a burglar who learns that the last people he robbed were also killed

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A beautiful waitress marries the owner of a lumber camp and then quickly starts to realize that he is not what she really wants

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: An eccentric area hermit furtively exchanges miscellaneous items for his subsistence but when he trades for McCoy assets Amos has him arrested for theft but is regretful when a hearing to put the man under state supervision ensues

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Get Smart

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Get Smart

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: The Hi-Ballers under new leader Riker are relentless in their pursuit of BJ and the Piston Packin Mamas especially after word gets out that BJ Snow White and the lady truckers are hauling truckloads of money for the Treasury Dept

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Roger wants to get out of having to take a trip to San Francisco with Kay and The Posts so he tricks Wilbur into believing that Mister Ed is suddenly going bald which in turn makes Ed a nervous wreck

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Kay inherits country property in New York so Roger enters into an agreement to sell their California home and move The purchaser who works for the IRS threatens to sue the Posts if their behavior is not to is liking

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan sneaks out of camp to a local German Hofbrau House to get the details of a nearby German army unit

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: The Germans want to safely build a synthetic fuel plant in Stalag 13 but Hogan convinces them that there is oil beneath the camp

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Binghamton devises a deceitful plan to have McHale chosen for the position of Liaison Officer at British Fleet HQ in Australia Parker and The Crew unwittingly help McHale to get the job then must scheme to get him off the hook when they find out that they wont be going along

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: With McHale and his Crew presumably killed in action publicity-hungry Binghamton plays the part of the grieving Commanding Officer when a War Correspondent comes to Taratupa looking for a big story But when McHale and the Crew turn up very much alive and well Binghamton must cooperate with McHale to work up a cover story

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Sgt Carter tries to make Gomer dislike him before graduation feeling that he hasnt done his job correctly if he isnt hated by ALL the recruits Sgt Carter asks for a transfer to California but things dont go quite as he expects

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Its Survival Training for the platoon two-man teams must rough it for five days Thinking Gomer will bring down the platoons rating Sgt Carter takes him for his partner Gomers small-town backwoods upbringing turns out to be an asset

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan discovers an underground source of hot water on the island but The Professor soon learns that the source of the hot water is an active volcano on the other side of the island

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: An impostor posing as Mr Howell claims to having been rescued and begins selling off Mr Howells stocks The real Mr Howell offers his fellow castaways a hefty reward to get him off the island and save his fortune

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: The stakes escalate as Flora Kate and Hassie refuse to go to the annual Grange Dance with Grandpa Luke and Tommy unless they receive a proper apology for Grandpas remarks to Tommy about how a man should handle women

programme.title: Love and Bullets
programme.desc: Arizona cop is sent to Switzerland to bring in the girlfriend of a dangerous mobster so she can testify against him The mobster sends someone too - assassins

programme.title: Fortress
programme.desc: Fortress

programme.title: The Octagon
programme.desc: A martial artist must defeat a plan by ninjas to create a worldwide training camp for terrorists

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: Rocky Bullwinkle Jet Fuel Part 39 Fractured Fairy Tales King Midas Peabodys Improbably History Stanley Livingstone Rocky Bullwinkle Jet Fuel Part 40

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: Rocky Bullwinkle Box Top Robery Part 1 Fractured Fairy Tales Hansel and Gretel Peabodys Improbably History Louis Pasteur Rocky Bullwinkle Box Top Robery Part 2

programme.title: Hong 105

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget travels to the Greek island of Thermos to stop MAD from stealing a secret formula that will transform lead into gold

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: When large scale blackouts begin to occur in cities with portals Taelon technology is blamed Augur and Liam investigate the death of a portal worker by a strange creature that feeds on energy and is particularly attracted to the Taelons

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: Debi is caught up in a fight simulation developed by the aliens to study human creativity

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: A vengeful voodoo priestess ensnares Arcane in a voodoo curse as revenge for his enslavement of Jim Kipp who had once saved a cousin of hers from drowning Alec helps Graham and a kindly voodoo priest save Arcane from certain dea

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: A self-proclaimed psychic comes to the swamp in search of Alec Holland with a message from his dead wife Linda She also reveals that Jim is still alive and will be heard from soon

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: Some subterranean miner start chanting for a planet that will cause the Moon to pass through a nebula deadly to those living at Moonbase Alpha

programme.title: Timerider The Adventure of Lyle Swann
programme.desc: Motorcycle racer Lyle Swann Fred Ward is cruising through the Mexican desert when he accidentally stumbles into a time-travel experiment and finds himself transported back to the Old West of the 1870s There he encounters an attractive local woman Belinda Bauer and a gang of criminals led by Porter Reese Peter Coyote Lyles motorized bike is impressive in the past -- until it runs out of gas Now Lyle must rely on his wits to take care of business and return to his own time

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Hazzard Jail is the meeting place for Black Jack Bender and a group of syndicate kingpins who are conspiring to smuggle illegal weapons in the area Bo and Luke - with a little help from Uncle Jesse Daisy and their friends Cletus and Cooter - use some good ol southern smarts to keep the mobsters at bay until the FBI can arrive to investigate

programme.title: Hercules 210
programme.desc: Hercules 210

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Det Keller goes undercover as an ex-con musician to bust a crooked parole officer and his ring of parolees

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: The IMF must thwart four young Nazis from claiming Hitlers fortune which they plan to use to finance a Fourth Reich

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Joe and Bill are assigned a task to find a purse snatcher They are surprised to learn it is a dog snatching the purses

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A beat police officer asks Sergeant Friday to be his counselor before a review board The office is accused of accepting a bribe

programme.desc: Cheyenne is asked by Amarillo Ames to help drive his herd to Dodge City and take over if he dies but he doesnt want to tell the men or his daughter why Ames dies so Cheyenne is forced to take over by force as he overcomes multiple foes

programme.title: The Scarlet and The Black
programme.desc: Vatican efforts led by Monsignor Hugh OFlaherty to save Allied POWs and downed Allied airmen as the Nazis invade Rome

programme.title: Hell Boats
programme.desc: An American commander serving under the British Royal Navy in 1942 is assigned to blockade the island of Malta and told to formulate a plan to destroy the Nazi arsenal in Sicily

programme.title: A Day in October
programme.desc: This story based on fact is about the movement of Danish Jews out of Denmark to neutral Sweden in the 1940s It focuses on a single family and tells of their involvement with the underground and of their own initially reluctant participation in sabotaging a munitions plant and of the daughters affection for one of the movements leaders

programme.title: Captain Newman MD
programme.desc: In 1944 an Army doctor is in charge of a neuropsychiatric ward at an Army Air Corps hospital in Arizona and he must deal with a variety of tough cases

programme.title: Love and Bullets
programme.desc: Arizona cop is sent to Switzerland to bring in the girlfriend of a dangerous mobster so she can testify against him The mobster sends someone too - assassins

programme.title: The Savage Bees
programme.desc: The festive fun of the annual Mardi Gras celebration is brought to a halt when a swarm of African killer bees escape from a foreign freighter

programme.title: Badge of the Assassin
programme.desc: Three black revolutionaries gun down two New York City police officers The subsequent investigation puts a white assistant DA and a black police detective on the trail of the killers that leads from New York to San Francisco and down to New Orleans

programme.title: Out of the Blue
programme.desc: Bad luck turns to tragedy for an ex-biker Dennis Hopper his drug-addict wife Sharon Farrell and their teenage daughter Linda Manz

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Hard Knocks 45 continues with some hard hitting action in MMA! This episode features an amateur matchup between Joe Mapanda and debut Sheldon Williams. Following are pros Dusty Kramps vs. former Hard Knocks Amateur Champion, Devon Smith. Our final fight for the evening is a pro bout between dynamic fighters Justin Schmit and Vyron Phillips.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Raul Tutarauli vs. Artur Lemos

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: One of the most experienced fighters in the series, Nick Thompson has the scars to prove it. Ansar Chalangov will be looking to come out hard for the Russians.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Elhadji Ndour v. Calum Robb.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Out of the Cage reveals the private thoughts and emotions of an MMA fighter, the ambition that drives them and how they are affected when encountering defeat or facing triumph. Featuring Alex Martinez HK39

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Coaches in fight sport are at times an underrated but yet intergral part of an athlete's success. What makes them give up their day, weeks and years to help their fighters be the best in the world? This episode features Fransisco Azevendo as we delve into the life of a coach.

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: The Lightning League visits a planet which harbours the greatest computer ever built hoping its terminals hold information on Audrics whereabouts The computer Logos keeps switching Audric back and forth between helping and fighting Jayce

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: In 1878 Jesse James robbed a gold shipment from Wells Fargo and hid it somewhere in Carlsbad Caverns New Mexico VENOM has discovered the clues leading them to the treasure but MASK is hot on their heels

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Scott and T-Bob find the treasure of Brian Boru at the end of an Irish rainbow but VENOM soon finds out and tries to get it for themselves

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: Brothers of Destiny

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: Demon Tied by Blood

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kid Icarus feels awful because his height is a problem Duke discovers a magic lamp and the genie grants Kid Icaruss wish to become bigger Kid Icarus turns into a giant and comes to realize that being bigger has a lot of disadvantages

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Dragon Lord and Mother Brain try to turn every dragon evil The N team rescues Puff a white last good dragon baby

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Presto accidentally transports his friends to a faraway place where they face an enormous danger literally Now he must climb to the new heights of courage and master his magic to save the others

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The kids are adopted by a loving caravan leader who is searching for his daughter who was abducted by a demon

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Inspector Gadget has a double mission not only to retrieve a pearl necklace but also to stop the gang from making an alliance with Chow

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget and Penny are in Italy However Cheif Quimby gives Gadget an assignment It tells him that DrClaw is planning on stealing a priceless artifact known as the Golden Pizza However Gadget has to join an opera to find and stop the MAD agents from stealing the Golden Pizza Plus another agent is planning to use his singing plant to help DrClaw steal the Pizza Gadget must stop DrClaw from stealing the Golden Pizza and destroy the singing plant

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The Renegades persuade a disgruntled genius to use his new weapon against the Guardians

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Cy-Kil reduces Leader-1 Scooter and Turbo to the size of toys but when the tiny Guardians escape their enemies must shrink themselves to go in pursuit

programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: A tussle with a comet hurls the Pride and crew twenty-five years back in time to Jayces home planet They search and find Audric when he was a student Jayce tells him he is his son and after much hesitation Audric almost believes him
